textByHashes.01c4df5a5329e27a710274803b093bbcabe1f9f1: Hello there stranger, what's the meaning of this intrusion? A farmer's hovel is his castle!
textByHashes.d945616e0322e7d2aa288b303fce5a869eeec09b: A month's supply eh! Well, I was going to take them to market and just concentrate on the cows, but I reckon that little Jimmy's neck is worth a few scrawny chickens, don't you?
textByHashes.98ee700fd4f7896ea4ff2cfa124ac1764e23edc8: Well, Ok then. We need to get this organised. First off, we need to get some proper cages to get them chickens transported. I've never normally transported chickens in such large quantities before.
textByHashes.a95ea66506311c6089a6bef01186a21345c5cd98: We'll need to get some proper cages, but I have nothing like that here. You'll have to go and see my friend Horvik in Varrock. He's a pretty well known metal-smith and he's done me a few favours in the past.
textByHashes.e6390eb6cb0b2cc751e1fb11b4caee3dfdefc4b7: I'm afraid that I'll have to ask a small favour of you as well, my friend.
textByHashes.15dd3a14a8084d16898a12e302d750be77cbac8d: Could you get three bars of steel and take them to Horvik, that's what I owe him for a previous job that he did for me.
textByHashes.f0506cae4821e2990e1c472426a924b73205b516: Poor old Jimmy, locked in that cage...
textByHashes.d1a34e48c8a1bea8751912fa2d964c2606a8628d: Many thanks! Remember, you need to take him three steel bars.
textByHashes.bb765165902f83eaeb61d958057189098ea79d0e: You need to get three bars of steel and take them to Horvik in Varrock, ask him if he can make some chicken cages so that we can transport these chickens to those fanatics and release poor Jimmy.
textByHashes.b1a88157ea497d21274a5585d79ef0f0ee29b53d: How are those chicken cages coming along?
textByHashes.952c28fccc047de0f3b5f21f65301beb32202b40: Well, I need at least five! Come back when you've got that many!
textByHashes.25d7c5fb75a9c784289fb184ea40e22fe7cfa243: Well that's great! Well done! You can go and talk to those fanatics now and tell them that they'll get their chickens and they can let little Jimmy the Chisel go! Once again, thanks for your help.
textByHashes.b8ea9405c8d9dcc2e50d74da8eb48e5f16fe5024: Thanks for getting us those chicken cages...you can go and talk to those fanatics now and get Jimmy released.
textByHashes.d295f8219f9f9357a4b5bba6a23d7bc47f68f22a: Well well, what can I do for you?
textByHashes.af4cd08798b53361e5525681d624b51d7718dd8d: Lookin' to get into the business, eh?
textByHashes.bae0246a63df6831dfb0c8df3660aca5456cb598: Well, always happy to help another budding farmer out!
textByHashes.393f7a26f0c522fe127c58c43a3f4eecb23c97c7: Would always recommend me Groats Principles as yer basics.
textByHashes.881b592961852f4aca7fa079e82db1cd52177933: Aye. First one is that happy animals makes happy farmers.
textByHashes.a92bd7dba6a1aefde105fc3dac7f0f7be10f3edc: Second of me principles is to never take more than you need. Greed'll stop you in your tracks.
textByHashes.5cbe40d7c0f1ac0c0e2be82b75dcbea546cb2afe: The last principle: never let the taxman know yer earnings. Money should be spent on the animals!
textByHashes.aac7d1a862f4200b01967e7df8a16a6905768c25: You're ahead of the game then!
textByHashes.aa3ab2e3566303eea1671c95e6087056104e326b: Anyway, feel free to grab me book on the topic from the shelf over there.
textByHashes.d3943599d64058d56341aad164e8bbb87a46063e: Mmm we already had this talk. Go read me book on the shelf over there.
